1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
2.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
2.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

2.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
2.kj: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
2.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

2.gl: to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively
2.kj: defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong.

2.gl: tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:
2.kj: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble.

3.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
3.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

3.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
3.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

3.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
3.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

3.kj: comfort, establish, hold up, refresh self, strengthen, be upholden.

4.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
4.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
4.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

4.gl: to be fat; transitively, to fatten (or regard as fat); specifically to anoint; figuratively, to satisfy;  to remove (fat) ashes (of sacrifices)
4.kj: accept, anoint, take away the (receive) ashes (from), make (wax) fat.
4.dv: a primitive root; also denominatively (from H1880 (דֶּשֶׁן))

4.gl: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)
4.kj: ascent, burnt offering (sacrifice), go up to. See also H5766 (עֶוֶל).
4.dv: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);

4.gl: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
4.dv: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow;

5.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
5.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

5.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
5.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

5.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
5.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
5.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

5.gl: advice; by implication, plan; also prudence

6.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
6.kj: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness

6.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
6.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

6.gl: properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy)
6.kj: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

6.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
6.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

6.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

7.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
7.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

7.gl: properly, to eye or (generally) to heed, i.e. pay attention; by implication, to respond; by extension to begin to speak; specifically to sing, shout, testify, announce
7.kj: give account, afflict (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), (cause to, give) answer, bring low (by mistake for H6031 (עָנָה)), cry, hear, Leannoth, lift up, say, [idiom] scholar, (give a

7.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
7.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

7.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
7.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

7.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
7.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

7.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
7.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
7.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

8.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
8.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
8.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

8.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
8.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

8.gl: a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
8.kj: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

8.gl: a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight)
8.dv: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy);

8.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
8.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

9.gl: to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative)
9.kj: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inhe

9.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)

9.gl: to duplicate or repeat; by implication, to protest, testify (as by reiteration); intensively, to encompass, restore (as a sort of reduplication)
9.kj: admonish, charge, earnestly, lift up, protest, call (take) to record, relieve, rob, solemnly, stand upright, testify, give warning, (bear, call to, give, take to) witness.

9.gl: to bend the knee; by implication, to sink, to prostrate
9.kj: bow (down, self), bring down (low), cast down, couch, fall, feeble, kneeling, sink, smite (stoop) down, subdue, [idiom] very.
